trust.name: junit-bom
trust.reason: BOM platform (metadata-only, no code) pulled transitively onto the buildscript classpath. Its per-version .module variants are resolved only during config-cache instrumentation, which --write-verification-metadata (forced --no-configuration-cache) cannot reach, so checksums cannot be auto-generated by updateBaseline. Trusting the org.junit BOM by coordinate is low-risk and version-proof; the actual junit JARs remain checksum-verified.

ignored-key.reason: Key couldn't be downloaded from any key server
